Accept or reject the constrained editor

Exercise the editor first, then record your verdict. It carries the exact validated seven-surface V2 project so downstream lane work begins from what you accepted.

Technical details

The verdict also carries the saved project hash and the reviewed full asset-catalog hash for shell_proof_grapes. Portal transports the decision but never becomes the design authority.
